item.title: The challenges of used car sales
item.description: Highlighting ssues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.Highlights issues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.

media:content.media:title: The challenges of used car sales
media:content.media:description: Highlighting ssues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.Highlights issues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.

item.title: Using Locking Lug Nuts Properly
item.description: Exploring why locking lug nuts offer little real protection and highlights common pitfalls in used car sales, including negative equity and overpriced inventory.

media:content.media:title: Using Locking Lug Nuts Properly
media:content.media:description: Exploring why locking lug nuts offer little real protection and highlights common pitfalls in used car sales, including negative equity and overpriced inventory.

item.title: Still Paying Dent Ding Packages?
